elements.text: I . Listening Comprehension

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_19
elements.text: Section A

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_20
elements.text: Directions: In Section A , you will hear ten short conversations between two speakers. At the end of each conversation, a question will be asked about what was said. The conversations and the questions will be spoken only once. After you hear a conversation and the question about it, read the four possible answers on your paper, and decide which one is the best answer to the question you have heard.

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_21
elements.text: W: What can I do for you, sir?

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_22
elements.text: M: I want to report a theft. My briefcase was stolen.

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_23
elements.text: Q: Who is most probably the woman?

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_24
elements.text: W: You will take care, won't you? The roads are very, very icy.

elements.id: docling_exam_paper_2004-2019上海高考英语听力原文和答案_page_017_25
elements.text: M: I will drive very slowly, I promise.
